text.title: grafana-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for grafana-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Deploying multiple Grafana replicas with SQLite.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SQLite is file-based and cannot be shared across processes. Concurrent writes from multiple replicas corrupt the database.

failure-mode.description: Mixing manual UI configuration with provisioning files in the same Grafana instance.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Provisioning on restart overwrites UI changes silently. Teams discover their manual changes are gone after the next deployment, causing repeated work and confusion.
